testcase.name: test_explain_returns_card3_split_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: card_3_affects should have at least 1 item assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: tests/test_card3_split_iteration10.py:128: in test_explain_returns_card3_split_fields assert len(exp["card_3_affects"]) > 0, "card_3_affects should have at least 1 item" E AssertionError: card_3_affects should have at least 1 item E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_explain_empty_input_rejected
testcase.failure: tests/test_card3_split_iteration10.py:227: in test_explain_empty_input_rejected assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 429 == 400 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
